name: pi-pet-hn
description: Virtual pet that levels up with every tool call + HackerNews scrolling ticker for pi coding agent.
readme:
# pi-pet-hn 🐣📰

Virtual pet + HackerNews scrolling ticker for [pi coding agent](https://github.com/badlogic/pi-mono).

## Install

```bash
pi install npm:pi-pet-hn
```

## Features

### 🐣 Virtual Pet
- Levels up with every tool call (3~7 XP each)
- ASCII art evolves: Egg → Kitten → Cat → Tiger → Dragon → Phoenix → Deity
- Mood system, personality titles, age tracking
- Persistent across sessions

### 📰 HackerNews Ticker
- Top 15 stories scrolling in footer
- Auto-refresh every 5 minutes

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/pet` | Toggle pet widget |
| `/pet <name>` | Rename your pet |
| `/hn` | Toggle HackerNews footer ticker |

## Pet Widget

```
  /\_/\      Mochi
 ( ^.^ )    LV.5  12 turns
  > ^ <     curious Cat
 /|   |\    ██████░░░░ 8/35 XP
 (___|___)  age: 2h
```
